name: The Inn of the Andromeda
description:
You enter a warm tavern. The room is lit mainly by two huge fireplaces 
at each end of the room. Small tables and a large bar furnish the room. 
The inhabitants of the inn are all atlantis of varying size and 
disposition. Most seem to regard you with suspicion. Few approach you. 
A large door leads north, out of the bar and back out into the city.
